title: How to build reliable software with AI agents
summary: A discussion on building reliable software with AI agents, emphasizing that human-in-the-loop verification and rigorous code review processes are essential to ensure AI coding agents reduce maintenance costs rather than increase technical debt. The speakers advocate for maintaining engineering discipline when operating at AI-accelerated development velocities.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech discussion examines how to build reliable software when AI coding agents accelerate development. The central argument: human-in-the-loop verification and rigorous code review remain essential, since AI-generated code can increase technical debt and maintenance costs without them. The speakers contend that engineering discipline must hold even at AI-accelerated velocities. The takeaway is that the value of coding agents depends on the review and verification practices wrapped around them, not the generation speed alone.
